title: Fix incomplete HTML escaping in escape
description: htmlesc.escape.escape(s) must escape the five characters &, <, >, double-quote and single-quote to their HTML entities (& < > " '). The ampersand must be escaped FIRST so the ampersands introduced by the other replacements are not double-escaped. The snapshot is BUGGY: it escapes < and > but forgets &, so '<&>' is escaped incorrectly. Fix htmlesc/escape.py using pure string logic only. Do not modify any test files.
